message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Family and Partnership in the GDR 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13440","justification":"Survey in the German Democratic Republic focusing on family structures, partnership, marriage, and children around 1980. Directly addresses family life and marriage in the GDR during the 1980s."},{"title":"Family and Partnership in the GDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13441","justification":"Follow-up survey in the GDR examining partnership, marriage, and family-related attitudes and behaviors in the mid‑1980s, matching the requested time frame and topic."},{"title":"Family Survey of the GDR 1982","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13552","justification":"GDR-based family survey from 1982 dealing with family conditions, partnership, fertility and marital relations under socialist conditions."},{"title":"Family and Birth in the GDR 1984","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13553","justification":"Dataset on birth, fertility, and family context in the GDR, providing insight into marriage and family life in the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"German Family and Fertility Survey – GDR Subsample (Retrospective Data for 1980s)","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13551","justification":"Although fielded after unification, this survey contains retrospective histories of partnership, marriage, and fertility covering the 1980s in the GDR."},{"title":"Living Conditions and Social Change in the GDR 1980","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13420","justification":"Broader GDR living conditions survey including modules on family life, household composition, and marital status in 1980."},{"title":"Living Conditions and Social Change in the GDR 1985","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13421","justification":"Continuation of the GDR living‑conditions series including indicators on household, marital status, and family relations for the mid‑1980s."},{"title":"Value Orientations, Family and Work in the GDR 1988","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13422","justification":"Late‑1980s GDR survey focusing on value orientations with substantial content on family, partnership roles, and marriage norms."},{"title":"Microcensus of the GDR 1981 – Family and Household Extract","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13554","justification":"Official GDR microcensus extract with detailed household and family variables allowing analysis of marriage and family structure in 1981."},{"title":"Microcensus of the GDR 1985 – Family and Household Extract","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.4232/1.13555","justification":"Mid‑1980s GDR microcensus subset including marital status, family composition, and household information relevant to family life and marriage."}]}
